skills.body: A full-spectrum toolkit built for modern web development — from pixel-perfect interfaces to scalable back-end architecture.
skills.reactDesc: Component-driven UIs with server-side rendering and the App Router.
skills.typescriptDesc: Type-safe codebases that scale without surprises.
skills.nodejsDesc: Robust back-end services and REST/GraphQL data layers.
skills.postgresDesc: Relational databases modelled for clarity and speed.
skills.tailwindDesc: Design systems and fluid animations, hand in hand.
skills.devopsDesc: Containerised deployments and automated pipelines on Vercel and AWS.

about.introHeading: I build things for the web — and I care deeply about how they feel.
about.introBody: Based in San Francisco. Fuelled by strong coffee, open-source culture, and the quiet satisfaction of a perfectly optimised Lighthouse score.
about.bio1: I'm Alex Rivera, a Full-Stack Developer with 6+ years of experience shipping products that people actually enjoy using. My background spans early-stage startups, agency work, and open-source — which means I'm equally comfortable whiteboarding an architecture from scratch and polishing the last 5% of a UI that makes users smile.
about.bio2: I started my career as a front-end developer in love with CSS and gradually fell into back-end systems, databases, and DevOps out of sheer curiosity. Today I sit comfortably across the full stack, with a particular passion for developer experience, performance engineering, and design systems.
about.bio3: When I'm not coding, you'll find me hiking the Marin Headlands, contributing to open-source projects, or writing about web development on my blog. I believe great software is a craft — and I treat it that way.
about.pullQuote: Great software is a craft. I treat it that way.
about.socialBody: Follow my work on GitHub, connect professionally on LinkedIn, or catch my shorter thoughts on Twitter. I reply to every thoughtful message.

bio.label: About me
bio.p1: I'm a designer and developer passionate about creating digital experiences that are both beautiful and functional. With a background in both design and code, I bridge the gap between aesthetics and engineering.
bio.p2: Over the past few years, I've worked with startups and established brands to craft interfaces that users love. I believe great design solves problems elegantly, and every pixel should serve a purpose.
bio.p3: When I'm not designing or coding, you'll find me exploring new tools, contributing to open source, or writing about design systems and modern web practices.
bio.p4: I'm always interested in collaborating on meaningful projects. Let's build something great together.

about.intro: Crafting digital experiences with code and design
about.label: About
about.oneliner: I design and build modern web experiences
about.pullquote: Great design is invisible. It works so well you don't notice it.

contact.heading: Let's Build Something Together.
contact.body: Whether you have a project brief ready to go or just an early-stage idea, I'd love to hear from you. I typically respond within 24 hours.
contact.formBody: Fill in the form and your message lands directly in my inbox. Include project scope, timeline, and budget for a useful first response.
contact.placeholderSubject: Project inquiry, collaboration, or just saying hi?
contact.placeholderMessage: Tell me what you're working on...
contact.successBody: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.
contact.channelBody: Reach me directly at hello@alexrivera.dev, or find me on the platforms below. For urgent freelance inquiries, LinkedIn DMs get the fastest response.
contact.errorMessage2: Message must be at least 20 characters
